Package neqsim.process.materials

Class MaterialRecommendation

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.materials.MaterialRecommendation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MaterialRecommendation extends Object implements Serializable
Consolidated material selection and mitigation recommendation for one reviewed item.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
